title: Maja Blanca with Cocoa
description: A sweet and fluffy Filipino rice flour pudding featuring cocoa powder, perfect for satisfying midnight cravings. This Jain-friendly dessert is a reduced version of the traditional recipe.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together rice flour, cocoa powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, combine coconut milk, sugar, water, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Cook the mixture over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens.
In a small bowl, mix cornstarch and a little water to make a slurry.
Add the cornstarch slurry to the pudding mixture and cook for another minute.
Remove from heat and stir in coconut oil.
Pour the pudding into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Let it cool to room temperature, then refrigerate until chilled.
